/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/test_string_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/test_xml_scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/test_component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/test_appstream_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/test_sqlite_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appstream_tests.dir/test_real_appstream_data.cpp.o -o appstream_tests  /usr/lib64/libgtest_main.so.1.15.2 ../libappstream_core.a -lsqlite3 /usr/lib64/libgtest.so.1.15.2 -lpthread
